item.title: Building an Order Book in Python: From Broken to Production-Ready
item.description: An iterative walkthrough of building a limit order book, ground up.

item.title: About
item.description:
I’m Patrick Arvatu, a first-year student at TU Delft interested in quant trading, algorithmic systems, and software engineering.

I write about things I build — order books, trading algorithms, competition write-ups — and concepts I find interesting in finance and CS.

Currently competing in trading simulations and building toward quant/SWE internships for Summer 2027.

Find me on GitHub or LinkedIn.
